title: Porcelain Fused to Metal
short_description: PFM crowns and bridges for durable, practical fixed restoration cases.
description: Durable PFM crowns and bridges remain a practical choice for long-span units and budget-sensitive fixed cases. Framework control, porcelain layering and shade matching are handled with technician review at each stage.
card_alt: Porcelain fused to metal crowns and bridge framework

gallery.caption: Finished PFM crowns and bridges with metal substructure strength and ceramic esthetics.

details.label: Applications
details.text: Single crowns, multi-unit bridges and long-span fixed restorations.

details.label: Structure
details.text: Controlled metal substructure with porcelain layering and final characterization.

details.label: Checks
details.text: Framework fit, connector strength, contact, occlusion and shade consistency.
